  "findings": [
    "Sagging flexible duct exceeding 1/2 inch per foot between supports"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Install additional supports or tighten existing runs to limit sag to a maximum of 1/2 inch per foot per SMACNA and manufacturer guidelines"
  ],
  "rationale": "The flexible duct installation is roughed in but fails to meet SMACNA and IMC standards due to excessive sagging (>1/2 inch per foot), which restricts airflow and increases static pressure. The work is failed until corrected.",

    "ACCA Manual D"
  ]
